commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ee9d266dd0c0a621ebf7a46506a389db3b5d1e4b)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a default-off Telegram interleaved progress preview mode with two config keys, renderer helpers, dispatch wiring, docs/generated metadata, tests, and a CLI JSONL paragraph-break delta fix.

PR surface: Source +692, Tests +525, Docs +2, Generated 0. Total +1219 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings via source inspection: an interleaved assistant partial equal to the final answer can be stripped to an empty body and still flushed, and appendInterleavedDelta with body `go` plus delta `od` would currently produce `god` instead of `good`. I did not run tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A repair worker can address the two concrete renderer defects; the remaining config-surface acceptance is a maintainer decision after the code is fixed.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
